title: Editorial Studies
description: Four independent magazine-style editorial illustrations testing visual puns, symbolic structure, commercial mockup clarity, and watercolor line discipline.
creative_direction: Independent studies broaden the theme beyond the cover series: each image solves a different editorial brief while preserving hand-drawn linework, restrained watercolor, blank text areas, and a precise metaphor that works without explanation.

en.title: Editorial Studies
en.description: Four independent magazine-style editorial illustrations testing visual puns, symbolic structure, commercial mockup clarity, and watercolor line discipline.

zh-CN.title: 编辑插画单图研究
zh-CN.description: 四张独立杂志编辑插画，测试视觉双关、象征结构、商业 mockup 清晰度和水彩线条控制。
